_comment: Single source of truth for the CAiSE 2026 deck colour set. KU Leuven house-style base; hybrid figure strategy (baselines vs TSFMs = two groups; per-family hues only on family-comparison slides). The family trio is colour-vision-deficiency verified (Machado 2009): the full 5-line plot set (truth + baseline + 3 families) stays >=39 apart under deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia and grayscale. Consumed by slides/template/style.css (deck) and slides/scripts/figure_manifest.py (figures). Keep style.css :root in sync with this file.

ft_shades._comment: Within-family light->dark ramps for the fine-tuning slope (S8 left), derived from the family hues.

dataset._comment: Categorical colours for the 4 event logs (backup DF-complexity radar). A separate dimension from the model palette.
